room.caption: [6] This is sort of a secret, but not really a secret.

backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backMeadeland1 backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999
